rationale: The hypothesis names the 'proper subformula' relation (def:proper-subformula, 0117), which was missing -- only the general def:subformula was cited. Added def:proper-subformula as the load-bearing hypothesis; kept def:subformula (the Sub(phi) structure used in the proof) and def:formula-depth (the depth function compared).
notes: def:subformula is retained because def:proper-subformula is defined over it and the depth-decrease argument inducts on Sub-structure; the precise hypothesis term was the gap.
